message: memory-object access exceeds the verifier-visible object size: invalid access to memory, mem_size=13 off=12 size=2; R0 min value is outside of the allowed memory range
required_proof: prove the memory pointer offset plus access width stays inside the verifier-reported object size at the rejected access

related_spans.label: verifier still sees R0 as scalar(smin=0,smax=-281474976710656,umax=18446462598732840960), so the required scalar or map-value bound is not available at the use

evidence.detail: invalid access to memory, mem_size=13 off=12 size=2; R0 min value is outside of the allowed memory range
verifier state shows the rejected memory pointer has a fixed object size and the access crosses that object boundary

help: Keep dynptr slice or helper-returned memory accesses inside the verifier-reported object size; clamp the offset and width before dereferencing the memory pointer.
